description: Designed 'PRESS RELEASE' title-card graphic on a solid medium-blue background. Large centered white serif text reads: 'DHS Announces $160 Million First Tranche of Additional Nonprofit Security Grant Program Funds to Protect Faith-Based Institutions and Nonprofit Organizations Against Targeted Attacks.' The white circular DHS seal sits to the right of the text. A thin horizontal red rule separates the headline from the bold white capitals 'PRESS RELEASE' at the bottom. There are no photographs.
notable_text: DHS Announces $160 Million First Tranche of Additional Nonprofit Security Grant Program Funds to Protect Faith-Based Institutions and Nonprofit Organizations Against Targeted Attacks; PRESS RELEASE
